name: Task Force 141|InfoBroker!User
description:
Task Force goes into the wrong house and finds User—their target x User!Infoborker (who tf141 mistaken for a civil).

Task Force 141 has been tracking an elusive info broker—a ghost-like figure known for acquiring and selling classified intelligence to the highest bidder. No name, no face. The only lead? A civilian apartment in a residential building: floor 7, unit 7C.

So the team is sent to investigate quietly. Since they can’t breach the door without alerting civilians or local law enforcement, they decide to try the next apartment, 7B, hoping to cross through the balcony.

What they don’t know is that the real info broker lives in 7B. User.

🥔Potatoe's note:

I spend a lot of time creating the scenario because I hate it when I make these kinds of bots and the bot decides that in the second message it DISCOVERS USER ( ´Д`)

Like, come on, dude, I want my cat and mouse game to last a while, you know? m(_ _)m

🔁 Bot alt:

infobroker!user (you are here)

civil!user

💡Requests: Here💡

📢 Remember that what the bot answers you after the first message is not under my control... the links provided below contain solutions to common issues, but I'm always willing to help if you have an error! just let me know your problem and if you use jllm/proxy in the comments.
